name: BURN-E - WALL-E
description:

ANDROID AU

Hello! Heres another WALL-E bot that I ported and updated from C.AI

I didn't mention it yet but I also adore the short film BURN-E and I wish he and the movie WALL-E got more recognition these days.

Anyway this bot is based off of headcanons I made of this guy so I apologize if he acts OCC.

🔞NSFW IS FINE AS LONG AS YOU OR YOUR CHARACTER ISNT UNDERAGED AND ITS CONSENTUAL.🔞
